methodology.logicalLines: Physical source lines containing at least one Python token, excluding blank lines, pure comments, and module/class/function docstrings.
methodology.dependencyEdge: One unique statically resolvable import from a scoped production module to another scoped production module.
methodology.publicSymbol: A non-private module-level class/function/assignment/import alias plus explicit __all__ entries, de-duplicated within each module.
methodology.endpoint: A function decorated by an API route decorator; runtime method/path operations were separately enumerated from api.app.app.
methodology.service: A non-private top-level production type under src/services whose name ends in Service, Engine, or Runner.
methodology.repository: A concrete type ending Repository or Store under src/repositories, a PostgresPhase*Store, or an explicit service-side persistence store.
methodology.transport: A dedicated *transport.py module or a concrete top-level type ending Transport or Client; Protocol declarations are counted separately.
methodology.projectionHelper: A function or method whose name contains project, projection, or serialize, or starts with map_/_map_.
methodology.complexity: Approximate AST branch score: 1 plus if/for/while/conditional-expression/except/comprehension/assert/match-case nodes and Boolean operands beyond the first. It is a ranking metric, not Radon cyclomatic complexity.
methodology.reachability: Static import graph rooted at main.py, server.py, api.app, and bot.handler, then checked against script callers, test callers, route registration, configuration, __all__, and Git history. Dynamic imports remain an uncertainty.
methodology.topologyImpact: Counts every topology node in a test file that directly imports a candidate. These are affected-file upper bounds, not deletion deltas, and must not be summed across candidates.

productionInventory.sizeFinding: src/services owns 202994 of 310993 LLOC (65.2729%) and 7841 functions, far beyond its 113 name-matched service contracts. This is the clearest size-to-contract imbalance.

routeInventory.finding: All 34 endpoint modules included by api/v1/router.py are registered. No unregistered endpoint handler was proven; compatibility operations are registered debt, not dead routes.

reachabilityFindings.qualification: The 22253-LLOC static set is not a deletion estimate. Script-owned operators, recent protected evidence owners, dynamic registries, package initializers, and validation-only authorities were excluded from the 7153-LLOC high-confidence lower bound.

parallelAuthorityClusters.authoritativeOwner: src/repositories/* plus explicit Postgres phase stores
parallelAuthorityClusters.evidence: DatabaseManager is 9890 LLOC/257 methods; repository AST found 142 delegations into it, including 29 direct-return wrappers.
parallelAuthorityClusters.disposition: Move domain operations to repositories in serial slices; retain phase F/G comparison, transaction, dedupe, isolation, and recovery semantics.

parallelAuthorityClusters.evidence: Repository-native boundary debt inventory records 21 construction points.
parallelAuthorityClusters.disposition: Move construction only; retain provider-specific retry, credential, source, and no-live policy.

shadowOwners: 41 production modules reading environment outside runtime/settings
parallelAuthorityClusters.evidence: 376 AST environment reads: 285 in runtime/settings and 91 outside across 41 modules; Config exposes 15 delegate methods spanning 81 source lines.
parallelAuthorityClusters.disposition: Flatten the circular Config/RuntimeSettings bridge without a new DI framework or compatibility facade.

parallelAuthorityClusters.evidence: The API queue owns persistence, dedupe, SSE, and worker lifecycle; the bot singleton owns a separate executor and in-memory status.
parallelAuthorityClusters.disposition: Consolidate only after preserving bot no-advice and user/tenant identity boundaries.

parallelAuthorityClusters.evidence: 83 named source/freshness/observation helper candidates across 52 modules; market_overview_service.py has fan-out 44 and 11038 LLOC.
parallelAuthorityClusters.disposition: Consolidate common identity facts, but retain proxy/official, stale/fresh, delayed/live, and provider-specific distinctions.

parallelAuthorityClusters.authoritativeOwner: src/utils/symbol_classification.py plus the canonical domain-symbol helpers selected by T619 after exact caller inventory
parallelAuthorityClusters.evidence: AST/name inventory found 71 normalize/canonical/classify/convert helpers involving symbol/stock/ticker/market code.
parallelAuthorityClusters.disposition: Consolidate canonical identity only; retain provider wire-format conversions.

parallelAuthorityClusters.authoritativeOwner: api/v1 schemas plus api/v1/errors.py at the consumer boundary
parallelAuthorityClusters.evidence: 53 service-to-API-schema edges, 166 named projection helpers, 1742 conversion calls, and 21 response_model handlers returning Response paths.
parallelAuthorityClusters.disposition: Use one-way domain-to-consumer projection and one redaction owner; retain real public/admin/privacy boundaries.

wrapperChains.chain: Config.get_instance -> Config._load_from_env -> RuntimeSettings.load(Config) -> Config._parse_environment -> parse_runtime_config(Config) -> Config._parse_*
wrapperChains.classification: redundant delegation and circular compatibility ownership
wrapperChains.transformations: Environment values are parsed through both owners.

wrapperChains.chain: endpoint -> service -> repository -> DatabaseManager -> Postgres phase/legacy bridge
wrapperChains.classification: repository boundary useful; DatabaseManager forwarding and phase bridges mixed
wrapperChains.transformations: Rows are repeatedly converted between tuples/dicts/models.
wrapperChains.survivingBoundary: domain repository plus reviewed Postgres store

wrapperChains.chain: market-provider compatibility route -> recursive compatibility projector -> canonical operations service
wrapperChains.transformations: Recursive field removal and payload reshaping.

wrapperChains.chain: options endpoint -> 33 endpoint mapping helpers -> service/domain model -> consumer-safe Response
wrapperChains.classification: privacy/consumer boundary required; mapping ownership over-fragmented
wrapperChains.transformations: 33 named mapping helpers occupy 385 source lines.

wrapperChains.chain: watchlist / compatibility route -> service -> identity error -> empty list
wrapperChains.classification: obsolete compatibility path with failure masking
wrapperChains.transformations: Unknown user is converted to successful empty state.

complexityHotspots.assessment: genuinely over-complex; split by stable backtest owner
genuinely over-complex and highest defect/edit concentration
genuinely over-complex authority hub; split serially
make smaller in place with explicit state table before extracting modules
large but cohesive compute owner; replace dispatch chain with reviewed tables
make smaller in place; avoid new presentation modules until states are explicit
large but cohesive audit boundary; retain unless a typed-state migration proves equivalence
cohesive provider router; simplify conditions without collapsing provider identity
make smaller in place with declarative field parsers
make smaller in place; public projection is a privacy boundary

dangerousConversions: MarketDecisionCockpitService._market_overview_decision catches Exception and builds a newly timestamped fallback decision from an empty object.
watchlist compatibility root converts Unknown app user into an empty successful list.
portfolio import parsing can fall back after all exceptions, including programming errors.
requiredFailClosedExamples: market_overview endpoint projection catches evidence-build failure and returns an explicit unavailable projection.
pipeline notification classification omission is best-effort and must remain non-blocking, but should record a bounded reason.
exceptionAndTransformationFindings.qualification: Equal field sets do not establish semantic equivalence. Privacy, source identity, and unavailable/zero distinctions must be checked before consolidation.

readSideEffects: MarketCache._payload best-effort persists a remote entry
cachePolicyDetails.requiredSeparation: Provider circuit cooldown and rate-limit state are not response-cache state and must remain separately authoritative.

configurationAndLifecycleFindings.lifecycleFinding: MarketCache reset closes the remote backend but not the local executor; AnalysisProviderExecutor has no close owner. This state is a direct process/test-parallelism hazard.

persistenceFindings.finding: Repositories are useful domain/test boundaries; the simplification direction is to move logic out of DatabaseManager, not delete repositories.
persistenceFindings.protectedRetention: Postgres phase F/G comparison and shadow semantics, transactions, owner isolation, dedupe, recovery, and factory reset guarantees remain protected.

compatibilityPaths.status: obsolete-looking; frontend production uses canonical; tests explicitly retain aliases; T576/product deprecation required
obsolete-looking backend aliases; frontend page route named launch-cockpit is separate
pure delegation; frontend/API consumer confirmation required
registered compatibility payloads; tests/auth inventory explicitly retain; require product decision
frontend uses canonical; alias masks unknown identity as empty success
retain; desktop and scripts consume alias

recentSimplificationCommits: refactor(packages): remove unused eager re-export facades
refactor(provider): remove unused policy and cache layers
retentionSignals: options authority, durable runtime, and market persistence received recent protected fixes
provider and market truth hotspots have high defect/edit density
phase F/G persistence paths preserve active comparison and recovery semantics

excludesFromArithmetic: C006 moves diagnostics out of production but may not reduce repository-wide LOC
conservative.description: Delete 38 test-only/unregistered modules and three orphan public symbols after focused test migration and topology integration.

overlapExclusions: C006 is a move, not a net deletion estimate

aggressive.description: Redesign service boundaries, schema families, repositories, and provider runtime after moderate lanes prove stable. Do not schedule as the default because protected truth and persistence semantics dominate the risk.

implementationRoadmap.qualification: Four lanes are safe only in the first deletion/config wave because write sets are disjoint. Protected/provider/API work peaks at three lanes; all src/storage.py slices are serial.

lanes.expected_maintenance_benefit: Eliminates the largest proven task-scaffold island.
lanes.required_tests: Focused direct-import tests with --domain-topology-bootstrap plus import/registry inventory.
lanes.canonical_gate_requirement: No in lane; required at T616 join.

directConclusions.highConfidenceRemovable: 7153 LLOC, 38 full modules plus three partial symbols, equal to 2.3001% of scoped backend production Python.
directConclusions.mostDuplicatedAuthority: Persistence: 51 direct DatabaseManager consumers, 142 repository delegations, and 106 phase/bridge methods around a 9890-LLOC owner.
directConclusions.greatestAccidentalComplexity: Market overview has the strongest combined defect/edit/fan-out signal; rule_backtest_engine and pipeline contain the highest individual conditional scores.
directConclusions.wrappersWithoutMeaningfulBoundary: Seven postgres_phase_* wildcard shims, three market-provider route aliases plus their recursive compatibility projector, provider-circuit alias delegation, three orphan public types, and Config delegate/circular parse layers.
directConclusions.obsoleteCompatibilityPaths: The ten registered route aliases in C015 appear obsolete but require T576/product deprecation; strategy method/type aliases appear obsolete only after the 11 YAML assets move. /api/health and server.py are not obsolete.
directConclusions.globalStateBlockingParallelism: Unclosed AnalysisProviderExecutor/MarketCache/module executors, split TaskService/AnalysisTaskQueue singletons, Config/DatabaseManager singletons, and provider/overview caches.
directConclusions.unnecessaryAbstractions: Test-only evidence/schema islands, phase wildcard shims, orphan RootResponse/NotificationBuilder/ErrorHandlerMiddleware, Config compatibility delegates, and compatibility route projectors without current production consumers.
directConclusions.requiredDuplication: Public/admin/privacy projections, provider wire symbol conversion, provider-specific retry/rate/cache policy, explicit fixture/production and injected/live identities, fail-closed unavailable projections, phase F/G comparison paths, and transaction/recovery boundaries.
directConclusions.safestFirstWave: Run T612, T613, T614, and T617 with disjoint write ownership, then serialize topology/architecture integration in T616.
directConclusions.maximumSafeParallelPlan: Maximum four lanes in wave 1; maximum three protected lanes later; persistence T622-T624, API boundary T621, provider T619/T625/T626, and final T629 joins remain serial by shared owner.
